name: Oil Pastry
recipeInstructions: Combine flour and salt. Add oil, stirring until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Sprinkle cold water (1 tablespoon at a time), stirring quickly. Gather dough into a ball. To fit into a pie plate, roll dough to 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured surface. Place in a 9-inch pie plate; trim off excess pastry along edges. Fold edges under and flute. For baked pastry shell, prick the bottom and sides of the pastry generously with a fork. Bake at 450°F for 12 to 14 minutes or until golden brown. Yield: pastry for one 9-inch pie.
